name_cn:
DIOR Lady Horizontal Lady D-Joy!!️
The Lady D-Joy bag interprets Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from creamy white diamond quilted calfskin, it features a light gold-finished metal "D.I.O.R." charm to elevate the style, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. With a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Size: 26 x 13.5 x 5 cm
9250
